title: Death by Glamour Music disc
description: Replaces Disc 13 with Toby fox's "Death by Glamour"!
body:
In this texture pack, "13" Has been replaced with "Death by Glamour" by Toby Fox!
The disc's texture has also been changed to have Frisk's soul in the center.

**All credits go to toby fox, all I did was just add it into the game, this isn't for commercial purposes, I just want to share a little project i've made!**
